positive: A stylized, mystical composition featuring a majestic neon owl perched on a geometric crescent moon. The owl has intricate feather details rendered in deep teal and electric cyan. The background is a gradient blend of midnight blue and cosmic violet, suggesting a celestial nebula. The overall mood is ethereal, modern, and vibrant. Use strong, sharp lines, geometric abstraction, and a stylized glow effect. Central composition, high contrast, suitable for repeating pattern art. Vector art style mixed with vaporwave aesthetics. Clean silhouettes are essential. Perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, noise, grainy, amateur drawing, realistic photography, logos, copyrighted characters
